content: We can integrate neuroscience’s lateral inhibition mechanism into the 2025 generation of Intrinsic Curiosity Module (ICM)-driven autonomous agents to suppress redundant curiosity exploration of over-sampled, low-information state spaces that neighboring similar unexplored states have already been assessed for. This modified ICM will prioritize novel, high-discrepancy unexplored states while eliminating noisy, wasteful exploratory action loops that plague current curiosity-driven reinforcement learning systems.
